description: Tracks an active grievance filed on behalf of a member.
name: grievance

description: Grievance answered or pending at the first step with the supervisor.
name: step-1

description: Grievance escalated to the second step with plant labor relations.
name: step-2

description: Grievance advanced to the third step before the local committee.
name: step-3

description: Case referred to or in arbitration before a neutral arbitrator.
name: arbitration

description: Plant safety, ergonomics, or OSHA-related health and safety concern.
name: safety

description: Seniority-list, bumping, or recall-rights matter under the contract.
name: seniority

description: Overtime equalization, distribution, or forced-overtime issue.
name: overtime

description: Healthcare premium, coverage, or plan-design bargaining item.
name: healthcare

description: Pension contribution, multiplier, or retiree-benefit language.
name: pension

description: Cost-of-living adjustment formula or restoration proposal.
name: cola

description: Base-wage rates, classifications, and general wage-increase proposals.
name: wages

description: Disciplinary action, just-cause review, or discharge grievance.
name: discipline

description: Attendance-policy point disputes and no-fault-attendance issues.
name: attendance

description: Layoff notice, WARN-act tracking, or reduction-in-force matter.
name: layoff

description: Subcontracting or outsourcing notice reviewed under Article 8.
name: subcontracting

description: Ratification-meeting, member-vote, or tentative-agreement task.
name: ratification

description: New-member organizing, sign-up drive, or shop-floor mapping work.
name: organizing

description: Steward mentoring, shadowing, or new-steward development item.
name: mentoring

description: Time-sensitive item with a contractual deadline that must not slip.
name: urgent
